underlying_goal: Execute Phase 10 (Inference Optimization) using the gsdr wave-based parallel execution workflow
friction_detail: Subagent hit context limit mid-plan requiring continuation, and a continuation agent committed to main instead of the worktree.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to execute Phase 10 plans via wave-based orchestration with sonnet executors; Claude completed Waves 1-2 and reached a verification checkpoint on Wave 3 with measurable ONNX speedup results.
